offer: For logistics carriers managing 5–15 vehicles, unpredicted vehicle breakdowns cause service delays. We predict breakdowns and schedule service instead of manual scheduling and reactive maintenance.
problem: unpredicted vehicle breakdowns leading to service delays
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for logistics carriers
